freshnessFilter.description: Only reply to tweets less than 24 hours old, remove tweets older than 48 hours from queue

antiSpam.description: 2 minutes between threads, 5 seconds between tweets in thread, follow author and like tweet for anti-spam

templates.description: Template selection weights for thread generation

productIsolation.description: Ensure only one BWS product is mentioned per thread

callToAction.description: All threads must include CTA, docs link, @BWSCommunity, and $BWS

productRotation.description: Rotate through products to avoid posting too many threads about same product consecutively

description: Configuration for product-specific educational thread replies. Evaluates 10 tweets per run, posts 2-4 threads per run (max 12/day), runs 2x daily (10 AM, 4 PM UTC). Target: 8-12 educational threads per day across 4 products (Blockchain Badges, BWS IPFS, NFT.zK, Blockchain Hash).
